name: greptile
description: Greptile connector plugin for Codex code navigation and PR review workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Greptile code intelligence from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects the tenant GREPTILE app so Codex can use Greptile for repository navigation and review-oriented workflows once the app is authorized.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Greptile to inspect this repo.
